summary: Iteration 39: Tested TopBar refactoring and all 12 features. ALL TESTS PASSED. Previous bug from iteration 38 (External DNS QPS auto-calculation) is now FIXED. Both edns-1 and edns-2 fields correctly use dnsPerServerCalculated/dnsAggregateCalculated field types and show Auto badge with placeholder '834'.
passed_tests: 1. Deployment toggle key fix (feature-nios/feature-uddi keys): NIOS toggle correctly toggles answers['feature-nios'] between 'Yes'/'No' - PASS
2. Hybrid toggle: Click Hybrid → NIOS and UDDI both activate with gradient. Click again → both deactivate - PASS
3. Customer Name editing: Input with data-testid='topbar-customer-name' is an editable INPUT element - PASS
4. Opportunity editing: Input with data-testid='topbar-opportunity' is an editable INPUT element - PASS
5. Add Data Center: Enter 'TestDC1' and '500' KW, click Add → pill appeared - PASS
6. Delete Data Center: Click X button on DC pill → removed successfully - PASS
7. Add Site: Enter 'TestSite1' and '200' KW, click Add → pill appeared - PASS
8. Delete Site: Click X button on Site pill → removed successfully - PASS
9. IP Calculator multiplier: Up arrow increases by 0.5 (2.5→3), Down arrow decreases by 0.5 (3→2.5) - PASS
10. Collapsible TopBar: Click header → inputs section collapses. Click again → expands - PASS
11. External DNS QPS auto-calculation: edns-1 and edns-2 show placeholder='834' with 'Auto' badge (matching idns-1/idns-2 behavior) - PASS (BUG FIX CONFIRMED)
12. Auto deployment model: NIOS only → NIOS mode, NIOS + UDDI → Hybrid mode with gradient - PASS
13. BONUS: Asset Insight + NIOS tooltip: Info icon appears on NIOS when Asset is active, shows '+Mgmt Tokens Added' tooltip on hover - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: TopBar.jsx correctly uses 'feature-nios', 'feature-uddi', 'feature-security', 'feature-asset insights' keys instead of old 'target-*' keys
Auto-deployment logic in useEffect (lines 147-155) correctly sets platformMode based on NIOS/UDDI/Asset combinations
AssessmentQuestions.jsx detectFieldType function (lines 214-223) correctly checks question.fieldType before text-based detection
questions.js has correct fieldType values: edns-1='dnsPerServerCalculated', edns-2='dnsAggregateCalculated'
context_for_next_testing_agent: All TopBar refactoring features verified working. External DNS QPS bug from iteration 38 is FIXED. Key data-testid attributes: toggle-feature-nios, toggle-feature-uddi, toggle-feature-security, toggle-feature-asset, toggle-hybrid, topbar-customer-name, topbar-opportunity. TopBar is collapsible by clicking the header row.

deployment_toggles.hybrid_behavior: NIOS + UDDI → shows gradient, both activate/deactivate together

dc_site_management.add_dc: Name + KW inputs + Add button creates pill
dc_site_management.add_site: Name + KW inputs + Add button creates pill

asset_nios_tooltip.icon: Info icon on NIOS and Asset buttons
